caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a small brown bow tie and tan suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small, framed photographs and various clothing items on hangers. To his left, a logo reads "PODCAST" under a graphic, and to his right, red and white text says "BOSS TALK JOY" above "PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking, and his facial expression shifts slightly, with his mouth opening further by the final frame. He remains centered in the shot, maintaining a consistent posture while talking into the microphone throughout the clip.
